Home.title: Teaching Workload Distributor
Home.subtitle: A Tabu Search-based tool for optimized faculty allocation

about.title: About the Project
about.p1: This project is part of a Master's research developed at the Institute of Mathematics and Computer Sciences (ICMC) of the University of São Paulo (USP). The goal is to develop a computational tool to assist in the process of assigning teachers to classes, considering preferences, scheduling constraints, and teaching workload balance.
about.p2: The tool uses the Tabu Search metaheuristic to find high-quality solutions to this combinatorial optimization problem, which is known for its computational complexity.

items.f1: Automatic assignment of teachers to classes using Tabu Search
items.f2: Consideration of teachers' preferences and priorities
items.f7: Analysis of teachers' teaching workload balance
